tasks.title: Цель продукта v1
tasks.description: Зафиксировать v1 brief и semantic-core закон: ИИ владеет смыслом результата.

tasks.title: Карта пользовательских сценариев
tasks.description: Поставщик: открыть закупку, извлечь позицию, найти товар, проверить evidence и выбрать следующее действие.

tasks.title: Определение релиза v1
tasks.description: Чётко отделить обязательный релизный объём от будущих экспериментов.

tasks.title: Правила минимальной сложности
tasks.description: Файл/модуль имеет одну ответственность; бизнес-логика не живёт в UI; явные зависимости.

tasks.title: Правовые и риск-границы
tasks.description: Персональные данные, платежи, закупочные ограничения, доказательность источников, отказ от ложных гарантий.

tasks.title: Выбор технического контура
tasks.description: Репозитории, язык, фреймворки, БД, очередь, сборка расширения, окружения разработки.

tasks.title: Единый словарь домена
tasks.description: Tender, Item, Run, SubscriptionSeries, SubscriptionTerm, TokenLot, Wallet, Org, User.

tasks.title: Definition of Done
tasks.description: Для каждой вершины: контракт, тест, документация, наблюдаемость, обратимость при риске.

tasks.title: Архив: карта API/контрактов
tasks.description: Снять текущие endpoint-ы, payload-и и client-side ожидания перед новой схемой.

tasks.title: Bounded contexts
tasks.description: Контексты, ownership и SubscriptionSeries → SubscriptionTerm → TokenLot contract.

tasks.title: Структура пакетов и модулей
tasks.description: Новая папочная структура без плоского backend и без popup/background монолитов.

tasks.title: Границы владения данными
tasks.description: Кто создаёт и изменяет каждую сущность; запрет второго источника истины.

tasks.title: Правила зависимостей
tasks.description: Domain не зависит от HTTP/UI; adapters зависят внутрь; shared только для контрактов.

tasks.title: Версионирование схем
tasks.description: Версии API, БД, cache payload, search result, archive index, feature flags.

tasks.title: Каталог state machines
tasks.description: Search job, item run, payment, SubscriptionSeries, wallet reservation, trust stage; Term immutable.

tasks.title: Таксономия ошибок
tasks.description: Единые public error codes, retryability, user copy, operator diagnostics.

tasks.title: Config/secrets/flags contract
tasks.description: Все env/секреты/флаги описаны, валидируются на старте и не расползаются по коду.

tasks.title: API-first contract
tasks.description: OpenAPI/JSON Schema + разделение AI-authored semantics/tool evidence/metadata.

tasks.title: Security/observability baseline
tasks.description: Authz, audit, metrics, trace ids, structured logs, rate limits, секреты, SSRF/XSS границы.

tasks.title: Стратегия strangler rewrite
tasks.description: Не переносить хаос: выделять золотые фикстуры, писать новое ядро, старое использовать как evidence.

tasks.title: ADR и module README
tasks.description: У каждого bounded context: назначение, входы, выходы, инварианты, тесты, владельцы.

tasks.title: БД и миграции
tasks.description: Postgres schema, migration runner, transactional boundaries, seed/dev reset.

tasks.title: User/Auth model
tasks.description: Users, sessions, refresh families, credentials, email/phone verification, API keys.

tasks.title: Tender/Lot model
tasks.description: Закупка, лот, заказчик, НМЦК/цена источника, procurement framework, source и registry ids.

tasks.title: Requirement model
tasks.description: Требования и evidence; финальные verdicts остаются AI-authored.

tasks.title: Product candidate model
tasks.description: Товар, продавец, цена, наличие, происхождение, источник, доказательства, риск-флаги.

tasks.title: Search run ledger model
tasks.description: SearchJob, ItemRun, Attempt, Step, Event, Snapshot, idempotency key, generation.

tasks.title: Money ledger model
tasks.description: Term-attributed lots, Series→Term resolution, project FEFO slices, reservation/settlement/reversal.

tasks.title: Subscription series/term model
tasks.description: Personal/org Series, immutable funded Terms, renewal policy и one-Term-one-TokenLot issuance.

tasks.title: Payment/Billing party model
tasks.description: Provider-neutral Payment; one success funds at most one SubscriptionTerm, corrections append-only.

tasks.title: Personal DB/document model
tasks.description: Папки поставщика, документы, build, vector store, attachment scope.

tasks.title: Extension installation model
tasks.description: Installation id, runtime policy, trust signals, browser capability, version metadata.

tasks.title: Audit/outbox/events model
tasks.description: Domain events, audit records, outbox delivery, support timeline, operator actions.

tasks.title: Cache/archive model
tasks.description: Cache finalized results without semantic rewrite; archive/tool evidence versioning.

tasks.title: Tenancy/ownership constraints
tasks.description: Org/user/project ownership, BOLA protection, no silent personal fallback for org billing.

tasks.title: Data migration blueprint
tasks.description: Какие таблицы создаются заново, какие данные импортируются, что остаётся legacy-readonly.

tasks.title: Auth module scaffold
tasks.description: Слои domain/service/repository/routes, без зависимости от search или UI.

tasks.title: Signup/login/session flow
tasks.description: Регистрация, вход, refresh, logout, step-up, verification, rate limits.

tasks.title: Organization lifecycle
tasks.description: Создание организации, membership, Owner/Admin/Member, invite/join/remove.

tasks.title: Projects/default project
tasks.description: Проекты как governance scopes; explicit project wins; one stored default, no fallback chain.

tasks.title: RBAC/authz engine
tasks.description: Единая проверка действий над user/org/project/wallet/search resources.

tasks.title: Account trust policy
tasks.description: Installation binding, anti-sharing stages, user-scoped recovery, operator pardon.

tasks.title: Support/operator domain
tasks.description: Cases, moderator actions, technical works, manual recovery, audit-safe operations.

tasks.title: Append-only ledger service
tasks.description: Term-provenance lots, transactions, idempotency, reversal вместо правки, invariant checks.

tasks.title: Internal cost meter
tasks.description: Resource telemetry, versioned rates, integer micro-USD и cost completeness.

tasks.title: Org budget reserve/settle
tasks.description: Atomic personal Term/project FEFO reserve → settle/release; ambiguity fails closed.

tasks.title: Subscription service
tasks.description: User/org Series и Terms, renewal/cancellation; provider-neutral funding handoff.

tasks.title: Payment provider adapters
tasks.description: Provider evidence/idempotency feeds neutral Payment; provider ids never become Series/Term identity.

tasks.title: Billing party/KYC service
tasks.description: ИНН/КПП, плательщик, hold/remediation, provider requirements.

tasks.title: Statements/reporting/export
tasks.description: Выписки, расходы по тендерам/проектам, CSV/XLSX, reconcile views.

tasks.title: Refund/reversal/dispute flow
tasks.description: Ошибочные списания, charge reversal, operator path, audit and notifications.

tasks.title: EIS client adapter
tasks.description: ЕИС через российский proxy/egress; TLS, retry, timeout и source attribution.

tasks.title: Tender resolver
tasks.description: По registry number/URL найти закупку и определить procurement_framework для extraction strategy.

tasks.title: Contract resolver
tasks.description: Контракты и исторические поставки как источник archive-first evidence.

tasks.title: Document fetch/extract
tasks.description: Применить 44/223 extraction strategy, извлечь ТЗ/PDF/DOCX и сохранить source metadata.

tasks.title: Requirement extraction
tasks.description: Извлечь requirements/evidence для AI-core, не финальные user verdicts.

tasks.title: Dictionaries/search scope
tasks.description: ОКЕИ/ОКПД и source-derived russian_goods_only; не legal verdict engine.

tasks.title: Item splitter/object SID
tasks.description: Стабильные позиции закупки, object_sid, item text, характеристики, количество.

tasks.title: Tender/EIS cache policy
tasks.description: TTL, revalidation, provenance, cache busting, stale-safe responses.

tasks.title: Search orchestrator
tasks.description: Создаёт item runs и ведёт до AI finalizer; не выбирает result после него.

tasks.title: Agent contract/prompts/tools
tasks.description: Cognitive core contract: AI-authored final result, tools as evidence.

tasks.title: AI provider adapter
tasks.description: Модели, retries, cancellation, usage telemetry, response validation.

tasks.title: Internet search adapters
tasks.description: Поисковые провайдеры, marketplace/site discovery, query generation, dedup.

tasks.title: Product page extraction
tasks.description: Цена, наличие, характеристики, продавец, происхождение, URL и snapshot metadata.

tasks.title: Evidence normalizer
tasks.description: Цитаты/URL/source evidence до finalizer; не verdict downgrader после него.

tasks.title: Match/verdict engine
tasks.description: AI-owned verdict/finalizer; deterministic logic только как tool evidence.

tasks.title: Archive-first engine
tasks.description: Исторические закупки/контракты/search memory перед дорогим web-first поиском.

tasks.title: Personal DB search integration
tasks.description: Опционально подключать документы поставщика к item run как ранний file_search контекст.

tasks.title: Worker/threading model
tasks.description: Очередь, parallel item runs, leases, backpressure, per-user/org concurrency.

tasks.title: Cancel/retry/timeout semantics
tasks.description: Отмена job/item, retry approval, transient errors, deterministic terminal states.

tasks.title: Progress/event stream
tasks.description: События прогресса, snapshots, polling/SSE contract, browser resume after reload.

tasks.title: Result projection API
tasks.description: Frozen SearcherResponse: projection without backend/UI semantic mutation.

tasks.title: Cost reservation settlement
tasks.description: Reserve до затрат; settle measured cost при success/cancel/failure; release только остатка.

tasks.title: Search cache/dedup policy
tasks.description: Reuse finalized results without semantic normalization; versioned payloads.

tasks.title: Search replay diagnostics
tasks.description: Trace по item run: inputs, tools, candidates, verdicts, costs, errors, replay id.

tasks.title: Backend route composition
tasks.description: Маленькие routers per context; app только wiring, middleware, lifespan.

tasks.title: Async search API
tasks.description: preflight/start/progress/continue/extend/cancel/usage-history endpoints.

tasks.title: Extension runtime policy API
tasks.description: Версия расширения, capabilities, maintenance gates, feature flags, trust enforcement.

tasks.title: Tender import API
tasks.description: Импорт из URL/registry/doc upload; возвращает нормализованную закупку и позиции.

tasks.title: Admin/support API
tasks.description: Operator-safe endpoints for wallets, trust, payments, technical works, diagnostics.

tasks.title: Generated client SDK
tasks.description: Typed extension API client from OpenAPI, no hand-written drift.

tasks.title: HTTP error middleware
tasks.description: Public error payloads, request ids, localized error mapping, safe debug only.

tasks.title: Technical rate/concurrency guards
tasks.description: User/org/api-key rate limits, search concurrency и abuse guards; не финансовая quota.

tasks.title: CORS/extension origins
tasks.description: Allowed extension IDs/origins/host permissions, distribution-specific policy.

tasks.title: Extension source layout
tasks.description: runtime/, content/, api/, domain/, ui/, components/, storage/, locales/, tests/.

tasks.title: Manifest/permissions
tasks.description: MV3 manifest, minimal host permissions, content script matches, optional permissions.

tasks.title: Background event bus
tasks.description: Service worker owns long-lived runtime coordination, alarms, notifications, resume.

tasks.title: Content page adapters
tasks.description: ЕИС/zakupki DOM extraction, browser-tab context, safe scraping boundaries.

tasks.title: Browser data capture contract
tasks.description: Captured tender URL/registry/doc/page data → typed DTO; no UI parsing.

tasks.title: Local storage/cache
tasks.description: Session, draft, progress resume, feature policy cache, schema migrations.

tasks.title: Extension API client
tasks.description: Generated client + auth refresh + org headers + idempotency + retry policy.

tasks.title: Runtime gating client
tasks.description: Версия, maintenance, account trust, entitlement gates before expensive actions.

tasks.title: Search controller
tasks.description: UI-independent orchestration: import tender, start run, poll/stream, cancel, continue.

tasks.title: Notifications/offscreen
tasks.description: Progress and completion notifications, sounds, browser permission flow.

tasks.title: Popup/side panel shell
tasks.description: Shell only composes routes/layout; no business rules in markup handlers.

tasks.title: UI component system
tasks.description: Buttons, cards, tables, dialogs, tokens, accessibility, empty/error states.

tasks.title: Frontend state store
tasks.description: Renderer-only selectors; no UI-derived verdicts/warnings.

tasks.title: Tender overview screen
tasks.description: Закупка, заказчик, позиции, НМЦК/цена источника, framework и provenance.

tasks.title: Requirement/item screen
tasks.description: Позиция ТЗ, характеристики, documents и read-only extracted search scope.

tasks.title: Search progress screen
tasks.description: Per-item runs, retry/cancel, live progress, resumable after tab/popup reload.

tasks.title: Results/evidence screen
tasks.description: Render AI-authored result/evidence; no hidden evaluator or fallback copy.

tasks.title: Token usage screen
tasks.description: Estimate, reservation, measured cost, token settlement/release и rate provenance.

tasks.title: Wallet/subscription screens
tasks.description: One WalletView, Series preferences, Term/lot provenance, project sources, validity and history.

tasks.title: Onboarding/errors/recovery UI
tasks.description: Понятные ошибки, trust recovery, maintenance overlay, payment-required states.

tasks.title: Localization/content
tasks.description: RU/EN messages, legal copy, no drift between feature labels and contracts.

tasks.title: Browser fixture harness
tasks.description: Mock backend, fixture tenders, content script hosts, Playwright flows.

tasks.title: Token pricing assumptions
tasks.description: Internal cost × 20, один wallet/token lots, reserve-before-work, no free quota.

tasks.title: Cost-to-token formula
tasks.description: Integer micro-USD, multiplier 20, token rate, ceil rounding и provenance.

tasks.title: Internal cost budget
tasks.description: Полный metering, верхний предел и concrete ResolvedFundingSource binding.

tasks.title: Funding preference routing
tasks.description: Pinned Personal Series/Project preference; concrete Term/project resolves atomically before reserve.

tasks.title: Token purchase/top-up flow
tasks.description: Покупка token lots, пополнение, expiry, уведомления о недостатке средств.

tasks.title: Project funding policy
tasks.description: Personal Series preferences, organization projects, member access и resolved-source controls.

tasks.title: Series/Term token packaging
tasks.description: Term-funded token lots, validity и settings; без grants, included runs и financial quota.

tasks.title: Decision/export artifacts
tasks.description: Сохранить подборку, выгрузка, justification pack, evidence snapshot для поставщика.

tasks.title: Product-boundary copy
tasks.description: Два static records: no-guarantee поиска и source currentness; без delivery/legal research.

tasks.title: Quality feedback loop
tasks.description: Оценки совпадения, жалобы на источник, false positive/negative, обучение правил.

tasks.title: Extract legacy useful logic
tasks.description: Забрать only tool evidence/invariants; no legacy result postprocessors.

tasks.title: Golden fixture corpus
tasks.description: Canonical AI-authored expected results, not legacy response dumps.

tasks.title: popup.js strangler plan
tasks.description: Разрезать UI на routes/components/controllers/stores; каждое извлечение закрывается тестом.

tasks.title: app.py strangler plan
tasks.description: Разнести routes/services/repositories/domain; app.py остаётся composition root.

tasks.title: Data migration scripts
tasks.description: Series/Term/Lot migration with provenance and idempotency, без мутаций ledger truth.

tasks.title: Legacy sunset gates
tasks.description: Обязательный upstream для всех legacy sunset handoff decisions; rollback before delete.

tasks.title: Domain unit tests
tasks.description: Чистые тесты моделей, state machines, scoring, ledger, authz, economics.

tasks.title: API contract tests
tasks.description: OpenAPI schema, generated client contracts, error payloads.

tasks.title: Integration tests
tasks.description: DB transactions, fake EIS, fake payments, fake queues, repository adapters.

tasks.title: AI/search deterministic tests
tasks.description: Mock tools/model and assert semantic freeze/no hidden postprocessors.

tasks.title: Extension runtime tests
tasks.description: Background, storage migrations, API client, content capture, gating, notifications.

tasks.title: End-to-end supplier journeys
tasks.description: Открыть закупку → AI-authored result → renderer/cache/billing proof.

tasks.title: Performance/load tests
tasks.description: Параллельные item runs, queue backpressure, API latency, extension responsiveness.

tasks.title: Security regression tests
tasks.description: BOLA, authz, SSRF in fetchers, XSS in UI, secret leakage, payment webhook validation.

tasks.title: Ledger invariant tests
tasks.description: No negative impossible states, idempotency, reserve/settle/release, reversal, reconcile.

tasks.title: A11y/i18n tests
tasks.description: Keyboard, focus, contrast, localized validation, legal text and naming consistency.

tasks.title: CI quality gates
tasks.description: Lint, type/schema checks, unit/integration/e2e partitions, artifact provenance.

tasks.title: Release evidence ledger
tasks.description: Что проверено, какими тестами, какие риски закрыты, какие флаги включены.

tasks.title: Observability dashboards
tasks.description: Search cost/latency, errors, wallet health, payment events, EIS failures, browser versions.

tasks.title: Runbooks/support playbooks
tasks.description: Проблемы оплаты, зависший поиск, неверный товар, блокировка trust, rollback.

tasks.title: Backup/restore/DR
tasks.description: Бэкапы БД, restore rehearsal, ledger safety, archive/index rebuild, secret rotation.

tasks.title: Feature flags/kill switches
tasks.description: Search, archive-first, payments, org billing, trust, personal DB, rollout slices.

tasks.title: Dev compose/seeds
tasks.description: Локальный запуск backend+DB+extension mock data одной командой.

tasks.title: Controlled pre-release env
tasks.description: Production-like проверка без ручных патчей и без смешения dev/prod секретов.

tasks.title: Pilot/beta cohort
tasks.description: Ограниченная группа поставщиков, реальные сценарии, лимиты затрат, быстрый откат.

tasks.title: Payment validation
tasks.description: Провайдеры, webhooks, receipts, recurring, KYC holds, refunds, ledger reconcile.

tasks.title: Legal package
tasks.description: Оферта, политика, согласия, payment terms, support contacts, risk disclaimers.

tasks.title: Extension packaging
tasks.description: ZIP/Store package, manifest versioning, provenance, update metadata, download site.

tasks.title: Go/no-go review
tasks.description: Метрики, ошибки, стоимость поиска, security, support readiness, unresolved blockers.

tasks.title: Rollback plan
tasks.description: Флаги, откат расширения/backend, payment safety, data recovery, incident owner.

tasks.title: Release candidate freeze
tasks.description: Новые функции закрыты; только blocker fixes; docs, contracts, tests frozen.

tasks.title: Final acceptance run
tasks.description: Полный regression/e2e/security/payment/search пакет на release candidate.

tasks.title: Релизная версия расширения
tasks.description: Готовый устойчивый продукт: модульный backend, расширение, поиск, billing, ledger, orgs, release ops.
